subject: perf(pwa): pause SW update polling when tab is hidden
body:
Current setInterval runs even when the tab is backgrounded, wasting
work and battery. Add a module-level visibilitychange listener that
clears the interval on hidden and resumes with an immediate check on
visible. Also skip starting the interval at init time if the tab is
already hidden.

Attached inside initUpdateDetection() alongside the controllerchange
listener, so the existing _initialized guard prevents duplicate
listeners under HMR and Platform.OS !== 'web' still gates native
builds.

Tags: pwa, performance, hooks
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-polish
Semver: patch
